lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਏ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਆਪੇ ਰਖੈ ਵੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: aap upaae naanakaa aape rakhai vek |
lines.english: He Himself creates, O Nanak; He establishes the various creatures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Salok, Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਦਾ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਖੀਐ ਜਾਂ ਸਭਨਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਏਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: mandaa kis no aakheeai jaan sabhanaa saahib ek |
lines.english: How can anyone be called bad? We have only One Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸੈ ਥੋੜਾ ਕਿਸੈ ਅਗਲਾ ਖਾਲੀ ਕੋਈ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kisai thorraa kisai agalaa khaalee koee naeh |
lines.english: Some have less, and some have more; no one is allowed to leave empty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਵੇਖੈ ਧੰਧੈ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa saahib ek hai vekhai dhandhai laae |
lines.english: There is One Lord and Master of all; He watches over all, and assigns all to their tasks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹਿ ਨੰਗੇ ਜਾਹਿ ਨੰਗੇ ਵਿਚੇ ਕਰਹਿ ਵਿਥਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: aaveh nange jaeh nange viche kareh vithaar |
lines.english: Naked we come, and naked we go; in between, we put on a show.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਅਗੈ ਕਾਈ ਕਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak hukam na jaaneeai agai kaaee kaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who does not understand the Hukam of God's Command - what will he have to do in the world hereafter? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਥਾਪਿ ਉਥਾਪੈ ਆਪੇ ਏਤੇ ਵੇਸ ਕਰਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape thaap uthaapai aape ete ves karaavai |
lines.english: He himself establishes, and He Himself disestablishes. He fashions them in various forms.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਸਿ ਥਾਪਿ ਜੀਆਂ ਕਉ ਭੇਜੈ ਜਿਨਸਿ ਥਾਪਿ ਲੈ ਜਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jinas thaap jeean kau bhejai jinas thaap lai jaavai |
lines.english: He sends out the various created beings, and he calls back the various created beings again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤੇ ਜੀਅ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਅਉਧੂਤੀ ਆਪੇ ਭਿਖਿਆ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jete jeea fireh aaudhootee aape bhikhiaa paavai |
lines.english: And all the human beings who wander around as beggars, He Himself gives in charity to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖੈ ਬੋਲਣੁ ਲੇਖੈ ਚਲਣੁ ਕਾਇਤੁ ਕੀਚਹਿ ਦਾਵੇ ॥
lines.translit: lekhai bolan lekhai chalan kaaeit keecheh daave |
lines.english: As it is recorded, the mortals speak, and as it is recorded, they walk. So why put on all this show?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਲੁ ਮਤਿ ਪਰਵਾਣਾ ਏਹੋ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: mool mat paravaanaa eho naanak aakh sunaae |
lines.english: This is the basis of intelligence; this is certified and approved. Nanak speaks and proclaims it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣੀ ਉਪਰਿ ਹੋਇ ਤਪਾਵਸੁ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਕਹੈ ਕਹਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: karanee upar hoe tapaavas je ko kahai kahaae |2|
lines.english: By past actions, each being is judged; what else can anyone say? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਚਲਤੁ ਰਚਾਇਓਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਪਰਗਟੀ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh chalat rachaaeon gun paragattee aaeaa |
lines.english: The Guru's Word makes the drama play itself out. Through virtue, this becomes evident.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਸਦ ਉਚਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gurabaanee sad ucharai har man vasaaeaa |
lines.english: Whoever utters the Word of the Guru's Bani - the Lord is enshrined in his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਕਤਿ ਗਈ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਕਟਿਆ ਸਿਵ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sakat gee bhram kattiaa siv jot jagaaeaa |
lines.english: Maya's power is gone, and doubt is eradicated; awaken to the Light of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਪੋਤੈ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin kai potai pun hai gur purakh milaaeaa |
lines.english: Those who hold onto goodness as their treasure meet the Guru, the Primal Being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Salok, Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sahaje mil rahe har naam samaaeaa |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, they are intuitively absorbed and blended into the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹ ਚਲੇ ਵਣਜਾਰਿਆ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਦੇਵੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: saah chale vanajaariaa likhiaa devai naal |
lines.english: The merchants come from the Banker; He sends the account of their destiny with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਸਤੁ ਲਈ ਵਣਜਾਰਈ ਵਖਰੁ ਬਧਾ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vasat lee vanajaaree vakhar badhaa paae |
lines.english: The merchants have purchased their merchandise and packed up their cargo.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਖੇ ਉਪਰਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਹੋਇ ਲਈਐ ਵਸਤੁ ਸਮੑਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: likhe upar hukam hoe leeai vasat samaal |
lines.english: On the basis of their accounts, He issues the Hukam of His Command, and they are left to take care of their merchandise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਈ ਲਾਹਾ ਲੈ ਚਲੇ ਇਕਿ ਚਲੇ ਮੂਲੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: keee laahaa lai chale ik chale mool gavaae |
lines.english: Some depart after having earned a good profit, while others leave, having lost their investment altogether.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥੋੜਾ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਮੰਗਿਓ ਕਿਸੁ ਕਹੀਐ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: thorraa kinai na mangio kis kaheeai saabaas |
lines.english: No one asks to have less; who should be celebrated?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁੜਿ ਜੁੜਿ ਵਿਛੁੜੇ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਜੁੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: jurr jurr vichhurre vichhurr jurre |
lines.english: United, the united separate, and separated, they unite again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਤਿਨਾ ਕਉ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿ ਸਾਬਤੁ ਲਾਏ ਰਾਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: nadar tinaa kau naanakaa ji saabat laae raas |1|
lines.english: The Lord casts His Glance of Grace, O Nanak, upon those who have preserved their capital investment. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤਿਆ ਕੇ ਬਾਪ ਕੇਤਿਆ ਕੇ ਬੇਟੇ ਕੇਤੇ ਗੁਰ ਚੇਲੇ ਹੂਏ ॥
lines.translit: ketiaa ke baap ketiaa ke bette kete gur chele hooe |
lines.english: They become the fathers of many, and the sons of many; they become the gurus of many, and the disciples.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਿ ਜੀਵਿ ਮੁਏ ਮੁਏ ਜੀਵੇ ॥
lines.translit: jeev jeev mue mue jeeve |
lines.english: Living, the living die, and dying, they live again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗੈ ਪਾਛੈ ਗਣਤ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਕਿਆ ਜਾਤੀ ਕਿਆ ਹੁਣਿ ਹੂਏ ॥
lines.translit: aagai paachhai ganat na aavai kiaa jaatee kiaa hun hooe |
lines.english: No account can be made of the future or the past; who knows what shall be, or what was?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਰਣਾ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਕਰਿ ਲਿਖੀਐ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰੇ ਕਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh karanaa kirat kar likheeai kar kar karataa kare kare |
lines.english: All the actions and events of the past are recorded; the Doer did, He does, and He will do.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਮਰੀਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਰੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: manamukh mareeai guramukh tareeai naanak nadaree nadar kare |2|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh dies, while the Gurmukh is saved; O Nanak, the Gracious Lord bestows His Glance of Grace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਰਮੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਲੋਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh doojaa bharam hai doojai lobhaaeaa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh wanders in duality, lured and enticed by duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਕਪਟੁ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਕੂੜੋ ਆਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: koorr kapatt kamaavade koorro aalaaeaa |
lines.english: He practices falsehood and deception, telling lies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਤ੍ਰ ਕਲਤ੍ਰੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਹੇਤੁ ਹੈ ਸਭੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: putr kalatru mohu het hai sabh dukh sabaaeaa |
lines.english: Love and attachment to children and spouse is total misery and pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਦਰਿ ਬਧੇ ਮਾਰੀਅਹਿ ਭਰਮਹਿ ਭਰਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jam dar badhe maareeeh bharameh bharamaaeaa |
lines.english: He is gagged and bound at the door of the Messenger of Death; he dies, and wanders lost in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: manamukh janam gavaaeaa naanak har bhaaeaa |3|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh wastes his life; Nanak loves the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak amrit ek hai doojaa amrit naeh |
lines.english: O Nanak, there is only One Ambrosial Nectar; there is no other nectar at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਤੇਰੇ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਤੇ ਰਤੇ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin vaddiaaee tere naam kee te rate man maeh |
lines.english: Those who are blessed with the glorious greatness of Your Name - their minds are imbued with Your Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Salok, Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑੀ ਪੀਤਾ ਰੰਗ ਸਿਉ ਜਿਨੑ ਕਉ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਆਦਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tinaee peetaa rang siau jina kau likhiaa aad |1|
lines.english: They alone drink it in with love, who have such pre-ordained destiny. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਮਨੈ ਮਾਹਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak amrit manai maeh paaeeai gur parasaad |
lines.english: O Nanak, the Ambrosial Nectar is obtained within the mind, by Guru's Grace.
